top_candidates.reasoning: The engineering layer cites BG 2.54's specific Sanskrit (Arjuna asks for description) and instantiates the verse's unique structural move (junior engineer asking for recognition marks of the senior). The analog could not be from any other verse without contradicting the explicit lexical citation.
